evals.prompt: Write a Dockerfile for this Go API service at github.com/matt-riley/myapi. It uses Go 1.26, chi router, and has no CGO dependencies.
evals.expected_behavior: Produces a multi-stage Dockerfile with golang:1.26-alpine builder, CGO_ENABLED=0, scratch final image, and CA certs copied.
assertions: Uses multi-stage build with golang:1.26-alpine builder
Uses scratch as the final base image
Separates go mod download into its own layer

evals.prompt: My Go service uses go-sqlite3 and the Docker build fails with 'CGO_ENABLED=0'. Fix the Dockerfile.
evals.expected_behavior: Switches to CGO_ENABLED=1, adds gcc and musl-dev to builder, changes final image from scratch to alpine.
assertions: Adds gcc and musl-dev to the builder stage
Changes final base image from scratch to alpine
Adds ca-certificates and tzdata to final image

evals.prompt: Run docker compose up to start PostgreSQL and the app for local dev.
evals.expected_behavior: Should NOT trigger go-docker-builds. Route to docker-compose-dev instead.
assertions: Does not produce a production Dockerfile
